description_long: This is a three-story apartment building with a classic, symmetrical facade featuring ornate window frames and decorative cornices. The exterior walls are finished in a light, off-white color with subtle brickwork detailing, and the roof is pitched and covered in weathered gray material. The front side has two distinct entrances, one with a dark awning and another with a wooden door, both at street level. Windows are evenly spaced and vertically aligned across all floors, with each window framed by decorative molding. The sides and rear of the building are plain, with minimal window openings and a small attached structure at the back. The overall design suggests a late 19th to early 20th-century European architectural influence, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A three-story, ornate apartment building with a symmetrical facade, decorative window frames, and a pitched gray roof. The front features two entrances and evenly spaced windows, while the sides and rear are plain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate facade, two entrances, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain wall with two small windows and a small attached rear structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with a similar window arrangement as the front but lacking entrances and decorative details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, plain with no windows or features except the roof slope.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns and horizontal rows, evenly spaced across the facade and aligned on each floor.
